productName.description: Product brand name — separate TextView above the description. FIX: Previously locator hardcoded 'LUKZER Electric Height Adjustable' which spans TWO elements and never matches. Brand and description are rendered as sibling TextViews.

productDescription.description: Short product description line — sibling TextView below the brand name

productPrice.description: Current selling price — matches pattern ₹N,NNN; use instance(0) to get selling price (before MRP)

discountPercentage.description: Discount percentage badge in the price row — green badge before the price (e.g. '68%')

buyAtButton.description: Buy Now CTA button at bottom right — content-desc includes animated chars and current price, e.g. 'Buy at ₹18,979'

photoCarousel.description: Product image carousel center — 6 photos total; swipe left (startX=540→endX=180, y=600) to advance
